channel.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Get the latest updates for popular awesome list

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Feb 27th, 2019
item.description:
AIR Native Extensions

Analytics ANE

  • HockeyAppstars2 - ANE for the Hockeyapp testing & distribute platform.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Feb 26th, 2019
item.description:
User Interface

UI Components

  • Flex-Android-Material-Skinsstars31 - Android Material Design skins for Flex Mobile components.

    • Development Tools

    Code Editors

  • Visual Studio Code - An AS3 & MXML language extension for Visual Studio Code. Runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

    • Utilities

    Data

  • AS3Commons Collectionsstars106 - Sophisticated and high-performance collections & iterators for AS3.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Feb 21st, 2019
item.description:
Development Tools

Code Editors

  • IntelliJ IDEA - Commercial IDE that supports many different languages including AS3.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Oct 30th, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks

UI Frameworks

  • AS3Commons UIstars60 - Layouting, focus and keyboard management framework.

    • File Formats

    Archives

  • ASZip - Generate ZIP archives from AS3.

    • File Formats

    PDF

  • AlivePDF - Client side PDF generation (githubstars29).

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Dec 8th, 2017
item.description:
Development Tools

Code Editors

  • Moonshine IDE - Moonshine is a free and open source middleweight IDE built with ActionScript 3 for ActionScript 3, Apache Flex®, Apache FlexJS® and Feathers development with Cloud and Desktop support.

    • Frameworks

    UI Frameworks

  • Apache Flex® - The Apache Flex® SDK is the evolution of the popular Adobe Flex SDK. The Apache Flex® SDK is an application development framework for easily building Flash-based applications for mobile devices, web browsers, and desktop platforms.
  • Apache Royale® - The Apache Royale® project is developing a next-generation of the Apache Flex® SDK. Royale has the goal of allowing applications developed in MXML and ActionScript to not only run in the Flash/AIR runtimes, but also to run natively in the browser without Flash, on mobile devices as a PhoneGap/Cordova application, and in embedded JS environments such as Chromium Embedded Framework. Royale has the potential to allow your MXML and ActionScript code to run in even more places than Flash currently does.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jul 18th, 2017
item.description:
File Formats

BSON

  • ActionBSONstars11 - BSON data encoder/decoder.
  • MongoAS3stars74 - MongoDB Driver which includes BSON I/O.

    • File Formats

    EXIF

  • AS3-exif-libstars6 - Parse JPEG EXIF data.
  • Exif-as3stars18 - Parse JPEG EXIF data.

    • File Formats

    Markdown

  • Showdown.as - Port of showdown.js.
  • Actiondownstars2 - Port of Javascript Showdown.
  • Markdownlibstars3 - Implementation of Markdown.

    • File Formats

    SVG

  • AS3SVGRendererstars102 - SVG Renderer for Flash Player.
  • SVGParserstars15 - SVG parser and renderer to FIVe3D and HTML5 canvas.

    • Networking

    Hardware

  • Kinect-Gesturesstars47 - AIR Kinect Gesture Library.
  • AS3midilibstars7 - Work with MIDI files and MIDI input/output devices.
  • AS3glue - Communication for Arduino boards.
  • AS3-arduinostars43 - Connecting Arduino Prototyping board to Adobe AIR.
  • AIRkinectstars115 - ANE for integrating with Microsoft Kinect. (examplesstars47).
  • KinectGatestars13 - KinectSDK to AS3 socket gate.
  • LeapMotionAS3stars307 - Integrate with the LeapMotion sensor (provides Gestures, Image, Skeleton/Bone @ 210 FPS).

    • Networking

    Protocols

  • GITstars6 - Client-side implementation of Git.
  • AIRplaystars22 - Client-side implementation of Apple's Airplay.
  • XMPPstars9 - Client-side implementation of XMPP library.
  • XMPPstars2 - Lightweight implementation of XMPP library.
  • AMQPstars43 - Client-side implementation of the 0-8 version of AMQP.
  • NTPstars6 - Client-side implementation of NTP Client (Network Time Protocol).
  • FUDIstars1 - Client-side implementation of the Puredata FUDI protocol.
  • TeaTimestars13 - AS3/Erlang implementation of the Croquet project's TeaTime protocol.
  • BDD Cucumberstars26 - A BDD Cucumber wire protocol implementation for Flash ActionScript.

    • Development Tools

    Code Editors

  • FlashDevelop - Premiere free & open-source IDE for AS3 & AIR, with code completion, debugging, and more.
  • Powerflasher FDT - Commercial IDE built on the Eclipse platform for development of Adobe Flash/AIR content.
  • Adobe Flash Builder - Commercial IDE for building applications on the Flex framework (with advanced debugging tools).

    • Development Tools

    Live Debuggers

  • Adobe Scout - Advanced visual profiling and debugging tool for AIR apps & games (supports Stage3D).
  • De-Monster Debuggerstars5 - Advanced tool to debug graphics and data from a live AIR application.
  • De-Monster Debugger (Starling)stars50 - Fork of De-Monster Debugger with support for Starling Framework.

    • Development Tools

    Asset Creators

  • FlashMovieClipConverterstars24 - Converts a Flash MovieClip to a Starling IAnimatable Sprite.

    • Development Tools

    SWF Obfuscators

  • secureSWF - Commercial AS3/AIR obfuscator with renaming, asset encryption and automatic code optimization.
  • irrFuscator - Commercial AS3 obfuscator for Flash and Flex SWF files.

    • Development Tools

    SWF Inspectors

  • SWFWirestars241 - Advanced SWF Decompiler, Inspector and Debugger Tools (website).
  • Velocity9stars25 - Basic SWF Inspector.

    • Development Tools

    SWF Decompilers

  • AS3Sorcerer - Premiere AS3 decompiler with 99% decompilation accuracy (supports SWF/SWC, Alchemy opcodes).
  • Sothink Decompiler - Advanced decompiler for AS2/AS3 (supports asset extraction and conversion of SWF to FLA/Flex).

    • Development Tools

    ANE Dev Tools

  • FreSharpstars41 - Build ANEs using C# with this C# wrapper for FlashRuntimeExtensions .
  • Swift-IOS-ANEstars55 - ANE starter kit written in Swift 3 for iOS 10 .

    • Frameworks

    MVC Frameworks

  • PureMVCstars124 - Industry-standard MVC framework for Flash (multicorestars59).
  • Robotlegsstars970 - Dependency injection, module/view/command management framework for Flash.
  • Apollostars1 - Dependency injection and messaging framework, which can be used as the basis for MVC projects.
  • Kotestars3 - Fast and lightweight MVC framework that brings together the best of PureMVC and as3-signals.
  • StarlingMVCstars126 - IOC Framework for Starling based games.
  • Somacorestars21 - Lightweight event-based AS3 MVC framework.

    • Frameworks

    UI Frameworks

  • Starling - High-performance 2D graphics engine built on Stage3D. API identical to Flash API. (githubstars2.3k, help).
  • Feathers UI - User interface components for Starling Framework (githubstars934, help).

    • Frameworks

    Game Frameworks

  • StarlingPunkstars146 - Framework built on Starling to add structure and organization to your game projects.
  • IsoHillstars108 - GPU-based Isometric engine built on Starling, with TILED map parser, layers, etc (website).
  • ND2Dstars325 - GPU-accelerated 2D game engine using Stage3D (ND2Dxstars36).
  • Nexusstars12 - GPU-accelerated 2D game engine using Stage3D.

    • Frameworks

    3D Frameworks

  • AwayBuilder - Visual workflow tool to import, optimise and bake 3D assets from a variety of sources.
  • Away3Dstars647 - Open-source GPU-accelerated 3D engine for Flash Player 11+ (examplesstars100).
  • Away3D OpenFLstars165 - Away3D for Neko, HTML5 and native CPP. (examplesstars37).
  • AwayPhysics FP11stars113 - Away Physics - 3D physics library for the Away3D FP 11 (examplesstars56).
  • Alternativa3Dstars369 - Alternativa3D GPU accelerated 3D engine (examplesstars33).
  • Flare3D - Commercial 3D platform with high-performance engine and Level-editor IDE.
  • Zen3Dstars4 - High-performance 3D engine for Adobe Flash & AIR (GPU based).

    • Frameworks

    Animation

  • GreenSock GSAP - The industry-standard animation library for Flash (TweenLite, TweenMax) (githubstars402).
  • StarlingGAFPlayerstars1 - Play back GAF animations using Starling (animations authored in Flash Pro).

    • Frameworks

    Signals

  • Signallerstars2 - Signals implementation with restricted rights for dispatching.

    • Frameworks

    Unit Testing

  • AS3unitstars5 - Unit testing framework for ActionScript 3.
  • expect.asstars10 - BDD-style assertion library for ActionScript 3.
  • AS3specstars21 - Tiny BDD framework for AS3, inspired by Bacon and RSpec.
  • ASunitstars49 - The only unit test framework that supports Flash Players 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10.

    • User Interface

    UI Components

  • MinimalCompsstars630 - Minimal ActionScript 3.0 UI Components for Flash.
  • MadComponentsstars44 - Popular Mobile UI Framework for AS3 / AIR.
  • AsWingstars13 - Open Source Flash ActionScript GUI framework.
  • GPUIstars65 - Tiny GUI Library based on Stage3D (GPU).
  • Falconstars21 - responsive/flexible mobile ui controls for Feathers.
  • Flex-mapsstars12 - Definitive solution for maps in Apache Flex.

    • User Interface

    Starling Components

  • Toasterstars3 - Simple feedback about an operation in a small popup. .

    • User Interface

    Layout

  • Adobe TLFstars23 - Adobe/Apache Flex Text Layout Framework (TLF).
  • TinyTLFstars10 - Versatile text layout framework built on top of the Flash Text Engine for Flash/Flex.
  • miglayout-asstars15 - Port of MigLayout, a superbly versatile Flash/Flex/FlashCocoa (SWT/Swing/JavaFX) layout manager.
  • Argilla-Mosaicstars4 - Dynamic layout library.
  • xropestars37 - Simple layout library for native AS3 display objects.

    • User Interface

    Multi Touch

  • TUIO Clientstars5 - Common framework for multi-touch hardware, supporting TUIO/FLC and TUIO/TCP (web).
  • Gestouchstars358 - Multitouch gesture recognition library for building better Natural User Interfaces.
  • Gestures.IOstars1 - Simplifies the way you create gesture-based Natural Interactions.
  • TouchScriptstars17 - Multitouch framework that makes handling complex gesture interactions on large touch surfaces easier.

    • Multimedia

    Augmented Reality

  • FLARToolKitstars13 - AS3 port of the industry standard ARToolkit library, for Flash Player 11. (website).
  • FLARManager - Lightweight framework for building augmented reality apps, using FLARToolkit/flare.tracker/flare.NFT.
  • EZFLARstars42 - A little wrapper to ease the way AR works.
  • IN2ARstars33 - SDK for IN2AR cross-platform Augmented Reality Engine.

    • Multimedia

    Data Visualization

  • Flextreemapstars19 - TreeMap data visualization component for Adobe Flex.
  • GraphVisualizerstars3 - A Flex 3 + ActionScript 3 web software to draw dynamic graphcs.
  • Weavestars370 - Web-based Analysis and Visualization Environment.
  • Social-gridstars22 - Abstract Grid Visualization for Social Media.

    • Multimedia

    Camera

  • CameraDetectionstars34 - Camera detection.
  • Fluocamstars11 - Virtual camera for Starling applications.

    • Multimedia

    Image

  • Scale9Imagestars13 - Optimized scale9Grid image for starling.
  • ASImageLibstars8 - BMP/PNG decoder for actionscript.
  • Async-Image-Encodersstars20 - Asynchronously encode BitmapData objects into image file format.
  • Flip-Planes-AS3stars14 - Photo slideshow effects.
  • AS3-transitions-libstars12 - Image Transitions Library.
  • Inspirit Imagestars1 - FFT, SURF, edge detection, fluid solver, etc.
  • Inspirit GPUImagestars174 - Framework for GPU-based image processing.

    • Multimedia

    Font

  • Firetypestars104 - Parse OpenType fonts and render them using Stage3D.
  • HanFontstars13 - AIR app for Chinese Font Embeding in ActionScript.

    • Multimedia

    Particle

  • Flintstars266 - Particle Engine for Flash and Flex.
  • Desuade Partigen - Desuade Partigen particle generation system (githubstars19).
  • Angulexstars10 - Particle Designer for the Starling framework (ActionScript 3).
  • SAPstars46 - Particle System for Starling.
  • Starling-Particlesstars319 - Particle system for the Starling framework, compatible with the "Particle Designer" from 71squared.com.

    • Multimedia

    Panorama Viewer

  • Pantaloons - Panoramic viewing in Flash Player.
  • SaladoPlayerstars90 - Panorama viewer.
  • PanoramicViewerstars1 - 3D Panoramic Viewer.
  • CuTystars10 - QTVR Panorama viewer based on Flash 10.

    • Multimedia

    QR Code

  • Zxing AS3 - QR code detection and generation (docs).
  • AS3-qrcode-encoderstars88 - QR code encoder in as3.
  • qrcode-asstars29 - QR Code reader which supports webcam on Windows, Mac and Linux.

    • Multimedia

    Sound

  • Standingwave3stars163 - Dynamic audio library.
  • Standingwave3-addonsstars1 - Addons for SW3.
  • Soundtouch-as3stars59 - AS3 Port of the SoundTouch Sound Processing Library.
  • SeiONstars8 - Sound Management Library.
  • AS3-Sound-Managerstars18- Upgraded version of the Sound Manager Class from Matt Przybylski.
  • AS3-audiostars5 - Audio Management in Actionscript.
  • SiONstars99 - Flash Software Synthesizer.
  • FlashWavRecorderstars243 - Recording audio and saving as a WAV.
  • Jukeboxstars2 - Music manager for Actionscript 3 projects.
  • Flodstars43 - Amiga SoundTracker (MOD) and FastTracker (XM) Replay Library.

    • Multimedia

    Video Player

  • Flowplayerstars278 - Flowplayer Flash, the video player for the Web.
  • Goplayerstars18 - Modern open-source video player written in ActionScript 3.
  • OSFlashVideoPlayerstars104 - Open source flash video player.
  • F4playerstars116 - Open Source AS3 Flash Video Player.
  • dashasstars104 - MPEG-DASH player written in ActionScript.
  • hlsplayerstars59 - HLS player for OSMF flash framework.
  • vgaplayerstars29 - Open source player for Adobe Flash Media Server streams (RTMP).

    • Database

    SQLite

  • AS3Querystars2 - Another SQLite ORM and query DSL for ActionScript.
  • Flexinestars4 - SQLite ORM for AIR.
  • AIR-sqlitestars75 - Utilities for working with SQLite databases in AIR.
  • AIRdbstars34 - AIR ORM for using client-side SQLite within AIR and Flex apps. Supports ActiveRecord style models, migrations and associations.

    • Database

    MongoDB

  • MongoAS3stars74 - MongoDB driver.
  • ActionMongostars1 - MongoDB driver.

    • Database

    DynamoDB

  • AWS-dynamodbstars1 - Driver for accessing Amazon's AWS DynamoDB.

    • Database

    Redis

  • AS3redisstars4 - Driver for Redis.

    • File Formats

    Archives

  • Untar-Workerstars9 - TAR extraction using AS3 Workers (background threads).

    • File Formats

    3D Formats

  • AsColladastars7 - Parse COLLADA 3D model files (forkstars1).
  • AsBlenderstars37 - Parse Blender .BLEND files.
  • AS3-bvh-parserstars5 - Parse BVH files.

    • File Formats

    CSV

  • CSV4AS3stars4 - CSV library ported from Apache Commons CSV.
  • Csvlibstars7 - CSV parser.

    • File Formats

    CSS

  • Fcssstars83 - Flash Cascading StyleSheet Library.
  • Sass4asstars4 - Syntactically Awesome Stylesheets for ActionScript 3.

    • File Formats

    FXG

  • Fxg-as3-libstars8 - Pure AS3 FXG rendering library (both runtime rendering and mxml supported).
  • Fxg2as3stars2 - Converting FXG markup into executable Actionscript 3 code.

    • File Formats

    GIF

  • AS3gifstars23 - Play and encode Animated GIFs.
  • GIF Playerstars57 - Play Animated GIFs in Flash.
  • Async-gif-decoderstars11 - Asynchronous GIF decoder & player.

    • File Formats

    JSON

  • Actionjsonstars125 - Faster, more advanced ActionScript 3 JSON library.
  • Jamesonstars14 - JSON Document Object Mapper.
  • Serialkillerstars4 - JSON & XML serialization library.
  • JsonMapperstars2 - Typed JSON parser.
  • JSONToolsstars16 - JSON errors, the speed of the JSWoof JSON library, and E4X style queries dubbed E4J.

    • File Formats

    PDF

  • PurePDFstars138 - Complete PDF library, port of Java iText.
  • HalcyonPDFstars3 - OpenStreetMap PDF renderer.
  • PDFCasestars3 - PDF Library.
  • PDFViewstars7 - PDF viewer built from scratch.

    • File Formats

    SWF

  • AS3abcstars2 - Low level library to parse, create, modify and publish ABC (Actionscript Block Code) files.
  • SWFWirestars241 - SWF Decompiler and Inspector Tools.

    • File Formats

    XML

  • XMLSerializerstars3 - Library which allows data serialisation from ActionScript to XML and from XML to ActionScript.
  • Nudgestars1 - Framework to serialize/deserialize objects as XML.

    • File Formats

    XLSX

  • AS3-xlsx-readerstars41 - Parse Open XML Excel (.XLSX) or Open Office spreadsheets.

    • Networking

    Servers

  • AIR-Serverstars45 - Socket Server library for Adobe AIR.

    • Networking

    OAuth

  • oauth-flexstars7 - OAuth.io plugin for Apache Flex/ActionScript.
  • oauth-as3stars4 - Mavenized, RSL version of oauth-as3 library - OAuth for ActionScript 3.
  • Actionscript-oauth2stars109 - Interfacing with OAuth 2.0 services.

    • Networking

    HTTP

  • Hendrix-HTTPstars11 - Lightweight HTTP library for ActionScript 3 (as3) inspired by Square's OkHttp.
  • Amazon Web Servicesstars24 - AS3 API for AWS.

    • Networking

    P2P

  • P2Plocalstars26 - Local RTMFP connections.
  • Android-Flash-P2Pstars15 - P2P Communication between a Client.swf and an Android Device with AIR.
  • NetGrouperstars25 - Wrapper for NetGroup and RTMFP Multicasting abilities to create quick P2P multiplayer games over local networks or Adobe Cirrus.
  • HydraP2Pstars95 - Simplifies the peer-to-peer API introduced in Flash Player 10.1.
  • GroupP2Pstars2 - P2P-based netgroup.
  • HLS-P2Pstars84 - Flash OSMF based hybrid cdn&p2p hls solution.
  • P2Pmessagingstars1 - Simple messaging framework for doing P2P in Flash.
  • ArcusNodestars176 - RTMFP Rendevouz Service For Peer Assisted Networking With Adobe Flash on Node JS.

    • Networking

    Sockets

  • AS3WebSocketstars245 - WebSocket client implementation for the final WebSocket Draft RFC6455.
  • Socket.iostars36 - Socket.IO Actionscript 3 client.
  • AMFsocketstars11 - Bi-directional RPC library for high performance network communication.
  • Sockpuppetstars2 - Complete Ruby/ActionScript socket client/server with AMF.
  • Socket.io-flashstars45 - Communication to Socket.IO v.0.8+ servers.
  • ws-flash-clientstars15 - Reliable minimalistic WebSocket client (uses Adobe Flash where native WebSocket is not available).

    • Utilities

    Artificial Intelligence

  • FiniteStateMachinestars3 - Finite State Machine for AI bot/agent.
  • N-GramPredictorstars3 - n-Gram predictor for AI bot/agent.
  • Naive-BayesPredictorstars2 - Naive-Bayes predictor for AI bot/agent.
  • HierarchicalStateMachinestars2 - Hierarchical State Machine for AI bot/agent.
  • Godmode-as3stars29 - Behavior tree implementation (artificial intelligence).
  • DecisionTreestars3 - Binary decision tree for AI bot/agent.
  • FuzzyStateMachinestars2 - Fuzzy State Machine (FuSM) for AI bot/agent.
  • SmartKid - Powerful AI engine for 2D & 3D games.

    • Utilities

    Async

  • EasyAS-Workerstars46 - Simplified wrapper for AIR Workers.
  • Worker-from-classstars77 - Create Workers from Class definitions.

    • Utilities

    Crypto

  • AS3Cryptostars88 - Fork of Henri Torgemane's excellent cryptography library (patchedstars15).

    • Utilities

    Geometry

  • Coralstars44 - High-performance classes for 3D mathematics (Point, Vector, Matrix, Quaternion).
  • Csg.asstars8 - Constructive Solid Geometry on 3D meshes.

    • Utilities

    Math

  • AS3LinAlgstars13 - Linear Algebra library (Jacobi SVD, Eigen Vectors/Values, Cholesky LU, etc).
  • Performance Primitives - High-performance math modeled on the Intel Performance Primitives.
  • FlexibleMatrixstars3 - A multi purpose Matrix class.
  • AS3eval - Packages the Tamarin ESC compiler to work within Flash Player. (alternatestars12).

    • Runtimes

    Emulators

  • NES Emulatorstars501 - Emulator of NES, Super Nintendo, Sega Mega Drive, GameBoy video consoles.
  • Commodore 64 Emulatorstars64 - A low level Commodore 64 emulator written in Actionscript 3.
  • 8080 Emulatorstars5 - An actionscript 3 space invaders emulator based on the intel 8080 processor.
  • 8-bit VMstars5 - An eight bit virtual machine written in actionscript.

    • Runtimes

    Interpreters

  • JSstars8 - RhinoJS, Port of Mozilla's Rhino JavaScript interpreter.
  • Simple JSstars17 - AS3-based Javascript interpreter.
  • MILstars2 - A MIL language VM and interpreter written in ActionScript.
  • TALESstars1 - TALES interpreter for ActionScript.
  • Schemestars1 - Scheme interpreter in ActionScript.
  • CannonMLstars3 - keim's CannonML (shmup scripting language) interpreter.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Audio ANE

  • VolumeProstars3 - Control native music stream volume and you can listen to the volume changes.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Multimedia ANE

  • AVANEstars58 - For building video encoding applications using FFmpeg.
  • PDFstars5 - Lets you open PDF files from your AIR mobile apps. Supported on Android and iOS.
  • SurfaceVideoPlayerstars10 - SurfacePlayer ANE helps you play video files inside your air mobile projects.
  • Speechstars13 - Convert strings to voice files and vice versa fully in the background.
  • QR-zbarstars86 - ANE for QR Code Reader.
  • Barcodestars13 - Scan almost any barcode type with this super fast barcode scanner ANE.
  • Bulletstars40 - Bullet physics simulation library.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    File System ANE

  • FileChooserstars15 - Enable users to select a file from the device filesystem.
  • ZipManagerstars11 - Zip or unzip large zip archives super fast using native process on Android and iOS.
  • Spotlightstars2 - Integrate with iOS 9 Spotlight Search, to index search items and user generated content.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Networking ANE

  • BitTorrentstars22 - For building BitTorrent enabled applications.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Hardware ANE

  • GPSstars14 - Get current device GPS location as fast as possible by automatically checking the best available provider.
  • GoogleVRstars16 - Google Virtual Reality SDK available to AIR developers.
  • Joystick-ANEstars17 - ANE Joystick Library.
  • AIROUYAControllerstars21 - ANE for the OUYA Controller.
  • AIRKinectv2stars49 - ANE for Microsoft Kinect v2 for Windows SDK.
  • Serial/MIDI/DMXstars43 - AIRBonjour, NativeSerial, NativeDMXController, NativeMIDI, VirtualMIDI, ExtendedMouse.
  • LeapMotionAS3stars307 - ANE for LeapMotion sensor (provides Gestures, Image, Skeleton/Bone @ 210 FPS).

    • AIR Native Extensions

    System ANE

  • TaskbarProgressstars9 - Display taskbar progress on OSX & Windows 7/8/10 .
  • DesktopToaststars28 - Display interactive toast notifications in Windows 8/10 and OSX.
  • AlarmManagerstars5 - Run a scheduled task even if your AIR app is closed.
  • InAppPaymentsstars22 - Identical in-app-billing and in-app-purchase ANE for Android and iOS.
  • PermissionCheckstars12 - Check and request for permissions in your Adobe Air app.
  • RateMestars3 - Ask your users to rate your app in the most efficient way.
  • Statusbarstars4 - Control the Statusbar in your AIR apps in runtime.
  • Badgestars0 - Control the iOS badge value.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Social ANE

  • Facebookstars31 - Integrate Facebook SDK into your AIR apps.
  • GCMstars2 - Use Google Cloud messaging on Android and iOS. .
  • Baidu - Baidu ANE for for iOS and Android.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Analytics ANE

  • Admobstars12 - Admob ANE.
  • GameServicesstars4 - Google Game Services for Android+iOS.
  • MoPub - ANE for MoPub advertising.
  • UMAnalyticsstars11 - ANE for UMAnalytics SDK (iOS and Android).
  • Localyticsstars10 - Localytics analytics for mobile Adobe AIR applications (iOS & Android).
  • Testflightstars26 - Apple TestFlight ANE.

    • Database

    CouchDB

  • AS3couchdbstars40 - Client-side API for interacting with a CouchDB instance.

    • Database

    MySQL

  • AS3mysqlstars11 - Driver for the MySQL open source database.

    • Database

    PostgreSQL

  • Pegasusstars16 - Driver for the PostgreSQL open source database.

    • File Formats

    MP3

  • AS3id3libstars1 - Parse MP3 ID3 data.

    • File Formats

    PSD

  • AS3-psd-parserstars34 - Parse Photoshop PSD files and render as BitmapData objects.

    • Networking

    Email

  • AIRXMailstars5 - Complete client-side email library supporting SMTP, POP3 and IMAP4.
  • AS3Mailerstars8 - Sends email using server script or invokes a mailto.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jul 17th, 2017
item.description:
User Interface

Starling Components

  • TabbedApplicationstars11 - View-based navigation model with swipe to navigate tabs.
  • DataGridstars7 - Displays a datagrid with column headings and smooth scrolling.
  • DataTreestars7 - Displays hierarchical data arranged as an expandable tree.
  • Canvasstars8 - Supports basic vector drawing functionality.
  • CircleProgressstars6 - Displays progress using a radial progressbar.
  • ZoomableControlstars4 - Allows a pinch to zoom using the multitouch inputs.
  • Google Mapsstars62 - Google Maps for Starling, optimized for mobile devices.

    • Multimedia

    Data Visualization

  • clearmapsstars63 - Mapping framework for data visualization.

    • Multimedia

    Camera

  • WebcamRecorderstars24 - Chromeless video/audio/still image recording from webcams.

    • Multimedia

    Image

  • AS3potracestars60 - POTrace implementation, to trace bitmap images to vector.
  • ATF-Encoderstars78 - Encode/decode ATF (Adobe Texture Format) files in pure AS3.
  • AS3-kltstars11 - Kanade-Lucas-Tomasi feature tracker implementation.

    • Multimedia

    Font

  • Ficon.asstars4 - Library to easily include icon fonts.

    • Multimedia

    Sound

  • SoundASstars141 - Modern & lightweight sound manager for AS3.
  • AS3sfxrstars82 - Port of sfxr from C++ to AS3, using the new sound and file capabilities of Flash Player 10.

    • File Formats

    ICAL

  • AS3iCALstars5 - iCal parser based on the RFC2445 specification.

    • File Formats

    SWF

  • Abc-abstraction - Allows ABC to be analyzed, manipulated, packaged back into an SWF, and run.

    • Networking

    Data Loader

  • GreenSock LoaderMaxstars402 - Provides an easy and powerful way to load assets at runtime.
  • BulkLoaderstars273 - Bulk asset loading library for Actionscript.
  • AssetLoaderstars120 - Multi-file/asset loader for AS3 built on AS3Signals.

    • Networking

    Sockets

  • FlashSocket.IOstars210 - Clients connect to Socket.IO servers from AS3/AIR clients.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 29th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks

Game Frameworks

  • YCanvasstars115 - High-performance 2D tile renderer and world map renderer.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 26th, 2017
item.description:
Multimedia

Camera

  • FlashyWrappersstars16 - Recording video from AIR apps on Windows/Android/iOS/OSX.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 25th, 2017
item.description:
Development Tools

Asset Creators

  • Adobe Animate CC - Premiere vector graphics and animation toolset for vector/spritesheet creation.
  • TILED Map Editor - Flexible tile map editor compatible with various AS3 game engines.

    • Frameworks

    Animation

  • FlashEff2 - Premiere programmatic animation library with 100+ transitions and text effects.
  • FlashEffNano - FlashEff transition library optimized for mobile devices, with 20+ transitions in 750 styles.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 24th, 2017
item.description:
Multimedia

Augmented Reality

  • FLAREmulatorstars9 - Test AR demos to see what works and what doesn't with or without a webcam.
  • NyARToolkitAS3stars5 - NyARToolkit AS3 edition. Marker based Augmented reality library.

    • Multimedia

    Data Visualization

  • Axiisstars8 - Data visualization framework with line, bar, wedge, column, cluster, area, smith and treemap charts.
  • Open Flash Charts - Line charts, Area charts, Bar charts, Pie charts, Scatter charts.
  • Flarestars309 - charts and graphs, supports data management, visual encoding, animation, and interaction techniques.
  • redadastars3 - Interactive visualization of weighted graphs using GraphML files.

    • Multimedia

    Sound

  • Local-recorderstars14 - Local audio recorder (no streaming server required). Currently requires Flash Player 10.1 or above.

    • File Formats

    CSS

  • CSS.as - Single-file CSS parser, part of TinyTLF project.

    • Frameworks

    Game Frameworks

  • AS3isolibstars39 - Isometric Library developed to assist in creating isometrically projected games.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 23rd, 2017
item.description:
AIR Native Extensions

Multimedia ANE

  • WebView (Tuarua)stars170 - Modern WebView for OSX 10.10+, Windows Desktop, iOS 9.0+ and Android 21+. Uses CEF (Chromium Embedded Framework) on Windows, WKWebView on iOS/OSX, and WebView on Android.
  • WebView (FlashLab)stars52 - Replacement for StageWebView, allows calling Javascript functions from AIR.
  • VideoPlayerstars29 - Play video files in Android or iOS native video player.
  • MyARstars38 - AR ANE supporting Android and iOS 64-bit based on Metaio's SDK.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Audio ANE

  • SystemVolumestars57 - Interact with the system volume for iOS and Android devices.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Networking ANE

  • Firebasestars56 - API for Google Firebase on Android and iOS with 100% identical ActionScript API.
  • DownloadManagerstars6 - Download large data files with pause/resume support.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Hardware ANE

  • Bluetoothstars8 - Scan for other devices, connect to and pair with them and transfer data between them.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 19th, 2017
item.description:
File Formats

MP3

  • AS3Icystars27 - Decode and play live MP3 streams from Shoutcast, Icecast and Limewire.

    • Frameworks

    UI Frameworks

  • Hiddenwoodstars4 - User interface library developed for a web app project, written in AS3 and in a MVC pattern.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 16th, 2017
item.description:
AIR Native Extensions

System ANE

  • WinDebug - Windows ANE to control applications, windows, memory, breakpoints, metadata, registry, etc.

    • Multimedia

    Particle

  • MotionParticleSpritestars0 - Design motion paths in Flash Pro and use it to guide Starling particles.

    • Frameworks

    Game Frameworks

  • FlashPunkstars377 - Framework to build 2D games. Provides graphics, events, inputs, animation, etc.
  • Flixelstars1.1k - Useful base classes that you can extend to make your own game objects.
  • Tetragonstars31 - Cross-platform framework to build any kind of game. Provides resource management, debugging facilities, multi-locale support, layered extendability, a game-oriented data structure, and more.
  • Pixelizerstars53 - Component based game engine to build 2D games. Provides rendering, animation, input, etc.

    • File Formats

    Archives

  • FZipstars179 - Mature library to load, modify and create standard ZIP archives.

    • Utilities

    Crypto

  • BlooddyCryptostars83 - High-performance library for processing binary data. This library contains MD5, SHA-1, SHA-2, Base64, CRC32, JSON, PNG/JPEG encoders.
  • AS3corelibstars1.5k - MD5 and SHA1 hashing, Image encoders, and JSON serialization.
  • ASCryptstars47 - Crypto library with a similar API for multiple languages.
  • Nexuslibstars9 - Reflection, serialization, seeded random number generation, cryptography, networking, and more.
  • Hashlibstars1 - Over 30 different hashing functions.
  • XXTEA-AS3stars5 - XXTEA encryption algorithm library for ActionScript 3.
  • Gibberish-AESstars1 - A fully OpenSSL compliant ActionScript 3 library for AES encryption.

    • Utilities

    Math

  • AS3Unitsstars1 - Port of NGUnits. Parsing, formatting, and converting between units of measure.
  • Zexpressionstars10 - Parse and evalate math expressions with functions and variables.
  • FlashFormulaEditorstars16 - Formula editor made in Adobe Flex.

    • Utilities

    Text

  • Linkify-as3stars9 - Convert URLs, e-mail addresses, phone numbers, into clickable links.
  • AS3hyphenationstars1 - Port of the Javascript text hyphenation library Hyphenator.js.

    • Frameworks

    Functional

  • AS3FPstars12 - Collection of functional idioms based on Haskell and Coffeescript.
  • Raixstars92 - Reactive And Interactive eXtensions simplifies working with interactive data (arrays) or reactive data (events).
  • Fxp-as3stars3 - Functional library inspired by the "mostly adequate guide".

    • Utilities

    Geometry

  • AS3geometrystars76 - Primitives, Polygons, Intersections, etc.
  • AS3GeomAlgostars41 - Collection of geometry algorithms. Port of hxGeomAlgo.
  • PathUtilsstars4 - Working with quadratic, bezier and line sequences.
  • Hilbertstars1 - Port of Hilbert curve from cortesi/scurve.
  • AS3AStarstars21 - Fast A-Star pathfinding algorithm.
  • A-star_pathfinderstars3 - A-Star pathfinding interface for tile based maps.
  • As3Pathfinderstars15 - Grid Path finding Library written using Dijkstra's algorithm.

    • User Interface

    Game Controllers

  • AS3dpadstars17 - A virtual touchscreen gamepad designed for Adobe AIR Mobile (Android/iOS).
  • Gamepadstars55 - Simulates an analog joystick input using the keyboard.
  • Advanced_Joystickstars19 - Joystick for the Starling Framework, designed for Adobe AIR Mobile.
  • AS3-Controller-Inputstars29 - Interact with Ouya and Xbox360 game controllers from Adobe AIR.

    • Frameworks

    Unit Testing

  • RobotEyesstars50 - End-to-end testing for TDD. Hybrid of WindowLicker and Drew Bourne's Mockolate.

    • File Formats

    3D Formats

  • EasyAGALstars118 - Simplifies development of AGAL shaders with code completion, code hinting, macros, etc.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 13th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks

UI Frameworks

  • Flowstars29 - Layout, effects, data binding and remoting framework to be used instead of Flex.
  • Swizstars231 - Brutally simple micro-architecture for creating RIAs with AS3 and Adobe Flex.

    • Frameworks

    Animation

  • DragonBones - High-speed skeletal animation using Starling, and tools to export animations from Flash Pro.
  • GTween - Small but robust library for programmatic tweening, animation, and transitions.

    • Frameworks

    MVC Frameworks

  • Hummingbirdstars28 - Build and deploy robust MVC applications for AS3, Mobile and the Starling Framework.

    • Frameworks

    Signals

  • AS3-signalsstars1.1k - New approach for AS3 events inspired by C# events and signals/slots in Qt.
  • react-as3stars33 - Signals/slots and functional reactive programming library.
  • Fa-as3stars9 - Write less, do more framework, modeled like jQuery.

    • Frameworks

    Unit Testing

  • hamcrest-as3stars180 - Matcher objects allowing 'match' rules to be defined declaratively.

    • User Interface

    UI Components

  • FlexBookstars11 - Awesome Page Flip component for Flex.

    • Frameworks

    Game Frameworks

  • CitrusEngine - Professional-grade game engine built built on Starling & Away3D.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
File Formats

CSS

  • Stylekit-as3stars39 - Skinnable user interfaces using CSS3.
  • AS3csslibstars1 - CSS3 parser, selector and style engine for ActionScript 3.0.
  • Jakute-CSSstars10 - Jakute is a CSS framework for ActionScript/Flash.

    • File Formats

    SWF

  • AS3swfstars525 - Low level library to parse, create, modify and publish SWF files.

    • Database

    CouchDB

  • Soupstars23 - Mixing CouchDB, Sinatra, AIR and RestfulX to create an offline/online ready app with undo/redo capabilities.

    • Frameworks

    UI Frameworks

  • Elastic-Listsstars108 - Fluid and powerful interface for facet browsing.

    • Frameworks

    Unit Testing

  • Flexunitstars272 - FlexUnit project for Actionscript 3 and Flex projects.

    • User Interface

    Layout

  • TransformManager - By Greensock. Interactive scaling/rotating/moving of DisplayObjects.

    • Networking

    Hardware

  • OpenTSPSstars186 - TSPS is a cross platform Toolkit for Sensing People in Spaces. It performs openCV operations on live video (Kinect, web camera, etc) and sends it to clients as JSON (via WebSockets), OSC, TUIO, or TCP.

    • Networking

    Servers

  • AIRhttpstars25 - HTTP Server for Adobe AIR.

    • Networking

    Sockets

  • SmartSocketstars14 - SmartSocket is a Java and PHP socket server engine, to make creating multi-user applications quick and painless.

    • Multimedia

    Panorama Viewer

  • Sphere_panoramastars1 - Panorama player with equirectangular texture written in AS3 (Alternativa3D).

    • File Formats

    XML

  • DynamicXMLParserstars2 - Dynamic parse xml content into predefined data classes (actionscript 3).
  • AStreamstars9 - XML to Object (and vice versa) mapping library written in AS3. Compatible with XStream.

    • Networking

    HTTP

  • HTTPFormstars5 - Emulate a multipart/form-data HTML form submission request, including file upload.
  • AS3httpclientstars6 - HTTP client implementation.
  • AS3httpclientstars241 - HTTP client implementation.

    • Runtimes

    Interpreters

  • Lispstars1 - Lisp dialect written in Actionscript, with compiler and bytecode interpreter.
  • Lisp Compilerstars93 - A lisp compiler for the AVM2.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Audio ANE

  • SongPickerstars27 - A song picker/player ANE for iOS and Android.
  • SilentSwitchstars37 - ANE for iOS to mute sounds if the hardware silent switch is on.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Hardware ANE

  • AIRControlstars17 - Adobe AIR Game Controller ANE.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    System ANE

  • Can-Open-URLstars38 - ANE for iOS to detect whether an app is installed to handle a specific URL scheme.

    • AIR Native Extensions

    Analytics ANE

  • Chartbooststars47 - ANE for the Chartboost SDK with compile scripts.

item.title: robinrodricks/awesome-actionscript3 Jun 10th, 2017
item.description:
User Interface

Layout

  • TransformToolstars77 - Free Transform Tool (AS, JS) for manipulating objects in 2D space.

    • Multimedia

    Font

  • BMFontRendererstars34 - AS3 renderer for bitmap font data in the BMFont format.
